rules.name: heavyFavoriteNoEarlyGoal
rules.description: Deep favorite still scoreless after 25 minutes: reduce blowout tail and increase under scenarios.

rules.name: marketTotalDrop
rules.description: Live total falling below pre-match expectation: let market signal cap remaining goal volume.

rules.name: redCardShock
rules.description: Red cards override normal pace estimates and increase uncertainty.
